_comment: SDSU campus systems the chatbot recognizes when a requester mentions integration. Seeded from the historical ServiceNow export (real system names people typed) plus known SDSU systems. DRAFT — SDSU IT should validate/complete this list. `aliases` are lowercased ways people refer to the system; `what_it_is` is shown to a confused requester.

systems.name: PeopleSoft Campus Solutions (my.SDSU)
systems.what_it_is: SDSU's student information system — registration, student records, admissions, and financial aid.

systems.name: Canvas
systems.what_it_is: The learning management system for courses, assignments, and grades.

systems.name: Google Workspace
systems.what_it_is: Campus email, Docs, Drive, and Calendar.

systems.name: SDSUid / Single Sign-On
systems.what_it_is: The campus single sign-on / identity system used to log into other systems.

systems.name: RedID
systems.what_it_is: The campus ID number used to identify students and employees.

systems.name: Oracle EBS / PeopleSoft HCM
systems.what_it_is: HR, payroll, procurement, and finance (employee information).

systems.name: Transact / CashNET
systems.what_it_is: Student payments and the Bursar's office / student accounts.

systems.name: Data Lake / Data Warehouse
systems.what_it_is: Central institutional data store used for reporting and analytics.
